reference_workspace_reports.title: Rust workspace self-host reference workspace report
reference_workspace_reports.known_caveat_summary: No known caveats at this revision.
reference_workspace_reports.rationale: The Rust workspace self-host reference-workspace report is current within its validity window, the certification-harness output is complete, and the owner has signed off.

reference_workspace_reports.title: TypeScript web-app reference workspace report
reference_workspace_reports.known_caveat_summary: Type-check performance is monitored but not yet at the target p95 on large monorepos.

waiver.reason: The TypeScript web-app report is within its validity window but due for refresh; an active waiver covers the scheduled re-run while the team finishes the large-monorepo optimization lane.

reference_workspace_reports.rationale: The TypeScript web-app reference-workspace report is within its validity window but inside the refresh window; an active waiver covers the scheduled re-run.

reference_workspace_reports.title: Legacy remote-SSH reference workspace report
reference_workspace_reports.known_caveat_summary: SSH key agent forwarding requires manual configuration on Windows.
reference_workspace_reports.rationale: The legacy remote-SSH reference-workspace report aged past its validity window on 2026-05-20 and has not been refreshed; the archetype pass-matrix row narrows automatically.

reference_workspace_reports.title: Extension-author reference workspace report
reference_workspace_reports.known_caveat_summary: No report has been captured; the extension-author archetype lacks a reference workspace.
reference_workspace_reports.rationale: No reference-workspace report has been captured for the extension-author archetype; the report is missing and the archetype pass-matrix row narrows automatically.

archetype_pass_matrix_rows.title: Rust workspace self-host archetype pass matrix
archetype_pass_matrix_rows.rationale: The Rust workspace self-host archetype passes all criteria, its reference-workspace report is current, and the owner has signed off.

archetype_pass_matrix_rows.title: TypeScript web-app archetype pass matrix

waiver.reason: The TypeScript web-app archetype passes core criteria but the large-monorego p95 type-check optimization is pending; an active waiver holds it provisionally certified.

archetype_pass_matrix_rows.rationale: The TypeScript web-app archetype passes core criteria under an active, unexpired waiver that covers the pending large-monorepo optimization lane.

archetype_pass_matrix_rows.title: Legacy remote-SSH archetype pass matrix
archetype_pass_matrix_rows.rationale: The legacy remote-SSH archetype's reference-workspace report expired on 2026-05-20; the matrix row narrows below certified until the report is refreshed.

archetype_pass_matrix_rows.title: Extension-author archetype pass matrix
archetype_pass_matrix_rows.rationale: The extension-author archetype has no captured reference-workspace report and lacks owner sign-off; the matrix row narrows below certified.

downgrade_rules.title: Reference-workspace report stale
downgrade_rules.rationale: A certified archetype whose reference-workspace report has aged past its validity window cannot publish as Certified; the claim narrows and publication holds until the report is refreshed.

downgrade_rules.title: Reference-workspace report missing
downgrade_rules.rationale: A certified archetype with no captured reference-workspace report has nothing to certify against; the claim narrows and publication holds until a report lands.

downgrade_rules.title: Reference-workspace report manually edited
downgrade_rules.rationale: A reference-workspace report that was manually edited outside the certification harness cannot back a Certified claim; the matrix must be recaptured through the harness.

downgrade_rules.title: Archetype pass matrix regression
downgrade_rules.rationale: An archetype that regressed against its prior pass matrix cannot maintain its Certified claim; the matrix must be recaptured and the regression resolved.

downgrade_rules.title: Archetype decertified
downgrade_rules.rationale: An archetype that was decertified in the certified-archetype manifest inherits that ceiling; the support-class ledger already holds the claim upstream, so this is expected inheritance.

downgrade_rules.title: Provisional waiver expired
downgrade_rules.rationale: A certified archetype that only held its claim because of a waiver narrows the moment the waiver expires; publication holds rather than silently keeping the certification.

downgrade_rules.title: Owner sign-off missing
downgrade_rules.rationale: No archetype may publish as Certified without a named owner sign-off; an unsigned matrix row holds publication until the owner signs.

publication.rationale: Two certified archetypes are narrowed below the certified cutline: legacy remote-SSH because its reference-workspace report expired on 2026-05-20, and extension-author because no report has been captured. Both reasons fire blocking downgrade rules, so certified-reference-workspaces publication holds until the reports are refreshed or the claims are formally narrowed.
